case_title: DE LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY vs. KUTCH, FRANCENE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY SERVED JUL-09-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT KUTCH, FRANCENE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT KUTCH, FRANCENE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KUTCH, FRANCENE $3,018.64 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,133.64
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DE LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $115.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY AS TO DEFENDANT KUTCH, FRANCENE
DECLARATION OF JAYNE KELLY DE LOPEZ FILED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LOPEZ, JAYNE KELLY
